name: Cranberry Chutney
recipeIngredient: 1 Orange, washed, quartered, seeded, coarsely ground
1 One-inch knob of fresh ginger, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. If using a processor, process orange chunks for 20 to 30 seconds; add quartered onion and process just until coarsely chopped.
2. Combine with remaining ingredients in a heavy saucepan.
3. Bring to a boil; lower heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 25 to 30 minutes. Flavor will improve after aging a day or two.
